info.name: External Results APIs (IFSC + USAC)
info.description: Reverse-engineered helper collection for viewing external IFSC/USAC result payload shapes. Includes example responses so endpoint shape is visible without sending requests. Run each provider's session request first to capture the cookie.

item.name: USAC
item.description: USAC scope notes: /api/v1/events/:id gives metadata + top_3_results + full_results_url; /api/v1/events/:id/result/:dcat_id is full category standings across rounds; /api/v1/category_rounds/:id/results is one round only.

exec: pm.test('USAC session cookie found', function () { throw new Error('No USAC session cookie found'); });
pm.test('USAC session cookie captured', function () { pm.expect(match[1]).to.be.a('string'); });

request.description: Live rounds feed. Note: browser route /live currently returns HTML 404, while /api/v1/live returns JSON.

response.name: 200 OK

originalRequest.description: Live rounds feed. Note: browser route /live currently returns HTML 404, while /api/v1/live returns JSON.

request.description: Event + categories metadata with top_3_results and full_results_url per category.

response.name: 200 OK

originalRequest.description: Event + categories metadata with top_3_results and full_results_url per category.
